helpdesk.title: IT Support Portal
helpdesk.welcome: Welcome to the IT Support Portal
helpdesk.intro: Submit a support ticket or track your existing requests for technical, account, or general issues. Our team is here to help!
helpdesk.submitRequestDesc: Report a problem, request support, or get help with our services.
helpdesk.trackReportDesc: Check the status and details of your submitted support tickets.
helpdesk.submitTicketDesc: Fill in the form below to report your issue. You will receive a ticket number after submission.
helpdesk.ticketSubmittedDesc: Your support ticket has been submitted and is being processed.
helpdesk.subject: Subject
helpdesk.trackTicketDesc: Enter your ticket number to view the status and details of your support request.

companyPicker.quickMenuDescription: Please select the company you want to work with. You can change it later.
companyPicker.selectOrRegisterCompany: Please select company or register your company first.

membershipSidebar.categoryServicesDescription: Browse all membership categories, subcategories, and their services in one place.
membershipSidebar.supportDescription: Need help or have questions about membership? Our support team is here to assist you.
membershipSidebar.modalDescription: Browse all membership categories, subcategories, and their services.

membershipApplication.noApplicationDescription: There is no membership application for this TIN.
membershipApplication.noApplicationHint: Start a new application to become a member.

sessionExpired.title: Session Expired
sessionExpired.message: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

ntb.title: Report & Track NTB Issues
ntb.intro: Report Non-Tariff Barrier issues or track existing reports with our streamlined platform.
ntb.reportNTBIssueDesc: Submit a new Non-Tariff Barrier report with detailed information.
ntb.e_g_DelayInClearingCargoAtPort: e.g., Delay in clearing cargo at port
ntb.reportSubmittedDesc: Your NTB report has been submitted and is being processed.
ntb.trackNTB: Enter your tracking code to check status the NTB Report you submitted.
ntb.trackNTBDesc: Check the status and feedback of your submitted NTB reports.
ntb.submitNTBDesc: Fill in the form below to report your NTB issue. You will receive a tracking code after submission.
ntb.ntbSubmittedDesc: Your NTB report has been submitted and is being processed.
ntb.subject: Subject
ntb.submitNTB: Report any non-tariff barrier you encounter. Fill out the form with detailed information about the issue.
ntb.listDescription: Track and report non-tariff barriers affecting your trade
ntb.noReportsDescription: You haven't submitted any NTB reports yet.
ntb.saveTrackingTip: ⚠️ Important: Save the tracking code provided after submission to track your report later.
ntb.useTrackingTip: 💡 Tip: Use the tracking code from your submission confirmation to monitor progress.

sidebar.viewReportsDescription: View all your submitted NTB reports and their current status.
sidebar.viewReportsHint: Track the progress of your reported non-tariff barriers.
sidebar.submitNewDescription: Report a new non-tariff barrier affecting your trade activities.
sidebar.submitNewHint: Provide detailed information about the barrier and its impact.

ntb.supportedFormats: Supported formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, JPEG, PNG

profileCompletion.description: Please complete your profile information to access NTB features
